title: We're Only Human by Zillick feat.th3scr1b3
lyrics: You're my safety net, you catch me when I fall How could I forget, the city where we lost it all Knew it would recover, cause we're only human Yeah, we're only human now, and we found each other Hidden under the ruins, so nothing could ruin us Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh  Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Yeah, that's right, you heard it right Human, only human, H-U-M-A-N Heartache, unforgiving, misery and nightmares Man, when does it all end? The pain, the misery, lack of integrity Looking for longevity, you people are the worst Judging, hypocritic, sizing others just cause you think you can Who gave you the right, you'll never know my plight How hard, everyday I have to fight, just to stay alive The anxiety I hold inside, will stay with me as I grow old and die But not before I give you a piece of my mind Maybe you're this way cause no one ever told you how your words fare You, yet you claim to be a good one Never hurting anyone, but your words they burn us We'll never see forgiveness Never see forgiveness, yeah, that's right You're my safety net, you catch me when I fall When I'm falling down How could I forget, the city where we lost it all Knew it would recover Cause we're only human, yeah, we're only human now And we found each other Hidden under the ruins, so nothing could ruin us Hidden in the ruins, the ruins of happiness Walk around and you'll see what happens when you use negativity To cause pain, sorrow and anxiety We are human, only human Excuses, cop outs, you're scapegoats But you can't escape folks, this is the bed you made So lie down, rest your head On all the unnecessary dead And those you fill with dread It's not too late, turn around Mend the wounds, plant the seeds in the ground But if you turn your back, then that's that There won't be coming back So choose, make a choice Think of all of those without a voice So forced to sit here with the hurting And all the things that takes them away You can't hear or at least you don't listen Yeah You're my safety net You catch me when I fall When I'm falling down How could I forget, the city where we lost it all Knew it would recover Cause we're only human Yeah, we're only human now And we found each other Hidden under the ruins So nothing could ruin us Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Yeah Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Now I'm lost for what we used to be And I'm still sitting here with this new degree of life When you told me you would be here still Who cut the cord, who cut the net from me I still wanted you on my team To the darkness I thought the light would bring us here But we're still incomplete with fear in our heart There is a bright light above And here's a place where we can start and be more like ourselves And here, not let that fear lead the way I'm asking you to find a way past your own thing That thinks it's selfishness that keeps us here It's just us, we're human my dear You're my safety net You catch me when I fall When I'm falling down How could I forget The city where we lost it all Knowing we'll recover Cause we're only human, yeah, we're only human now And we found each other Hidden under the ruins So nothing could ruin us Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Yeah Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh

lyricsSegments.text: You're my safety net, you catch me when I fall
How could I forget, the city where we lost it all
Knew it would recover, cause we're only human
Yeah, we're only human now, and we found each other
Hidden under the ruins, so nothing could ruin us
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Yeah, that's right, you heard it right
Human, only human, H-U-M-A-N
Heartache, unforgiving, misery and nightmares
Man, when does it all end?
The pain, the misery, lack of integrity
Looking for longevity, you people are the worst
Judging, hypocritic, sizing others just cause you think you can
Who gave you the right, you'll never know my plight
How hard, everyday I have to fight, just to stay alive
The anxiety I hold inside, will stay with me as I grow old and die
But not before I give you a piece of my mind
Maybe you're this way cause no one ever told you how your words fare
You, yet you claim to be a good one
Never hurting anyone, but your words they burn us
We'll never see forgiveness
Never see forgiveness, yeah, that's right
You're my safety net, you catch me when I fall
When I'm falling down
How could I forget, the city where we lost it all
Knew it would recover
Cause we're only human, yeah, we're only human now
And we found each other
Hidden under the ruins, so nothing could ruin us
Hidden in the ruins, the ruins of happiness
Walk around and you'll see what happens when you use negativity
To cause pain, sorrow and anxiety
We are human, only human
Excuses, cop outs, you're scapegoats
But you can't escape folks, this is the bed you made
So lie down, rest your head
On all the unnecessary dead
And those you fill with dread
It's not too late, turn around
Mend the wounds, plant the seeds in the ground
But if you turn your back, then that's that
There won't be coming back
So choose, make a choice
Think of all of those without a voice
So forced to sit here with the hurting
And all the things that takes them away
You can't hear or at least you don't listen
Yeah
You're my safety net
You catch me when I fall
When I'm falling down
How could I forget, the city where we lost it all
Knew it would recover
Cause we're only human
Yeah, we're only human now
And we found each other
Hidden under the ruins
So nothing could ruin us
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Yeah
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Now I'm lost for what we used to be
And I'm still sitting here with this new degree of life
When you told me you would be here still
Who cut the cord, who cut the net from me
I still wanted you on my team
To the darkness I thought the light would bring us here
But we're still incomplete with fear in our heart
There is a bright light above
And here's a place where we can start and be more like ourselves
And here, not let that fear lead the way
I'm asking you to find a way past your own thing
That thinks it's selfishness that keeps us here
It's just us, we're human my dear
You're my safety net
You catch me when I fall
When I'm falling down
How could I forget
The city where we lost it all
Knowing we'll recover
Cause we're only human, yeah, we're only human now
And we found each other
Hidden under the ruins
So nothing could ruin us
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Yeah
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
